item.title: Alcon Research LLC: GenTeal Tears, Lubricant Eye Gel, Sterile, 10g (0.34 Fl oz), Recall
item.product: GenTeal Tears, Lubricant Eye Gel, Sterile, 10g (0.34 Fl oz),
item.summary: Lack of Assurance of Sterility: Due to FDA inspection observations that it believes may impact product quality. Product details: GenTeal Tears, Lubricant Eye Gel, Sterile, 10g (0.34 Fl oz), Distributed by: Alcon Laboratories, Inc., Fort Worth, Texas 76134, USA, NDC: 0065-8064-01.
item.payoutAmount: Refund, replacement, correction, or disposal if stated by the official notice
